content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2024, and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL" for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data"}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2024, and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL" for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp; CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'; ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999) OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_final; CREATE TABLE J09C_final AS SELECT t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(sm.TITLE, nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(sm.FORENAME, nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(sm.SURNAME, nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(sm.STREET, nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(sm.STREETNO, nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(sm.CITY1, nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(sm.CITY2, nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(sm.EMAIL, nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON t.ANLAGE = eg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR; UPDATE J09C_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023'); UPDATE J09C_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023');

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999) OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

CREATE TABLE J09C_final AS SELECT t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", COALESCE(sm.TITLE, nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(sm.FORENAME, nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(sm.SURNAME, nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(sm.STREET, nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(sm.STREETNO, nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(sm.CITY1, nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(sm.CITY2, nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(sm.EMAIL, nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON t.ANLAGE = eg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR

UPDATE J09C_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

UPDATE J09C_final SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

args.email: Please find attached the J09C mandatory reading entries.
Please find attached the J09C export excluding mandatory reading and direct mail entries.

kwargs.content:
Process J09C completed.

Files created:
- J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv — 1230 rows
- J09C_DIRECT_MAIL.csv — 8613 rows
- J09C.csv — 15403 rows

Actions completed:
- Sent J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv to mandatory.reading@provider.com
- Sent 8613 direct emails via bulk mail service
- Sent J09C.csv to meter.readings@evu.com
- Deleted temporary tables J09C_temp and J09C_final
